output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT(STR(YEAR(?time)) AS ?year) WHERE {
  wd:Q41421 p:P166 ?stmt .
  ?stmt ps:P166 ?award .
  ?award rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , "nba champion"))
  .
  ?stmt pq:P585 ?time .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?time)
LIMIT 1

So the strategy would be to find all seasons where the Bulls won the championship (using P1346 or similar), check which of those seasons overlap with Jordan's tenure on the team (using P54 with start and end dates), then pick the latest year.
